hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain | wc -l | tr -d ' '); UNPUSHED=$(git log @{u}..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$DIRTY" -gt 0 ] || [ "$UNPUSHED" -gt 0 ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"📝 Sync reminder: %s uncommitted file(s), %s unpushed commit(s) — push when stable"}\n' "$DIRTY" "$UNPUSHED"; fi
